headline: How The Constellation Brands (STZ) Investment Story Is Evolving After Q3 And CEO News
summary: The fair value price target for Constellation Brands has been adjusted to about US$171.50 from roughly US$170.73, a small move that keeps the core valuation anchor almost unchanged. This kind of fine tuning fits with mixed Street research around Q3 results, where analysts are debating how much of a potential recovery in beer volumes and margins is already reflected in the share price. As you read on, you will see how these modest price target shifts connect to the evolving narrative and what...

headline: Wall Street Turns Tactical on Constellation Brands With $170 Target Into Earnings
summary: Constellation Brands (NYSE:STZ) just got a tactical boost from Evercore ISI heading into its April 8 full-year earnings release. The firm added Constellation to its Tactical Outperform list, citing likely top-line upside that should drive bottom-line leverage, while maintaining an Outperform rating and a $170 price target. With the stock trading near $151.17, the call ... Wall Street Turns Tactical on Constellation Brands With $170 Target Into Earnings
